Parameters.Name: ChocolateyConfigName
Parameters.Label: (Required) Config Name
Parameters.HelpText:
The config name you want to manage. This is a single config name. Multiple config names must be managed in separate steps.

Example:

* _cacheLocation_
* _commandExeecutionTimeoutSeconds_

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyConfigAction
Parameters.Label: (Required) Config Action
Parameters.HelpText: The action to perform on the config name.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
set|Set a config
unset|Unset a config

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyConfigValue
Parameters.Label: (Required / Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: The value of the config name you want  to set. This is not required if the action is 'unset' and required if the action is 'set'.

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyConfigOtherParameters
Parameters.Label: (Optional) Other Chocolatey Parameters
Parameters.HelpText:
Other parameters to pass to Chocolatey. You can pass multiple parameters separated by a space.

Examples:

* _--debug_
* _--debug_ _--verbose_
